channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Scouting Combine
item.description: The third day of the 2026 NFL Scouting Combine marked the beginning of measurements and on-field testing for the draft prospect. Here are our takeaway...

item.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Buzz, Rumors: Commanders Release OL Tyler Biadasz
item.description: Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around the NFL.

item.title: No. 13 Michigan State Grabs A Close Road Win Over No. 8 Purdue, 76-74
item.description: No. 13 Michigan State survived Braden Smith’s missed 3-point attempt with a second to play for a 76-74 win over No. 8 Purdue.

item.title: NFL Combine: How NIL Has Made It Harder — And Easier — To Scout QBs
item.description: Identifying the right QB has always been hard for NFL teams. League sources elucidate how that challenge is much different in the NIL era, for better ...

item.title: Lionel Messi Tracker: Inter Miami Star Knocked Over By Fan In Chaotic Friendly
item.description: Tracking Lionel Messi's goals and top moments for Inter Miami and the upcoming FIFA World Cup.

item.title: What to expect at NFL combine workouts: Kiper, Miller, Reid and Yates answer 11 questions
item.description: Which NFL draft prospects should have great combine performances? Who could run the fastest 40-yard dashes, and who will climb boards this week?

item.title: Who wins People's Puskás Award for world's best amateur goal of the year?
item.description: A sublime overhead kick, a long-range half-volley, and some exquisite control followed by a rabona.

item.title: How the top QB signings will fit in 2026
item.description: The top 2026 recruits at each position have their new homes. Here's how their games will work.

item.title: The game that will define the 2026 season for every power-conference team
item.description: These are the showdowns you should already have circled on your college football calendar.

item.title: Premier League Power Rankings: Chelsea up, Liverpool down in ratings of all 20 teams
item.description: ESPN's Premier League Power Rankings return to look at all 20 teams: Chelsea are up, Liverpool are down, and Crystal Palace are on fire.
